description: Style NoteSober coloured base with shiny stones makes these sandals classy yet elegant. They can be worn with Ethnic Indian wear and also with a pair of jeans and a nice kurta with some ethnic accessories.Product DetailsBlunt toed sandals with a sequinned thong style straps and bow detail on the strap with bead stitched on itBrown footbed and a heel patchTPR outsole with an upraised heelMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
